name: Mighty Oak Tree Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Line two cookie sheets with waxed paper.
2. Beat the peanut butter, margarine, and vanilla together until smooth.
3. Slowly beat in powdered sugar and flour until well blended.
4. Roll rounded teaspoons of dough into balls and shape them to have a point.
5. Refrigerate the dough until firm.
6. Dip the flat part of each cookie into melted chocolate, about halfway up.
7. Roll the cookies in chopped nuts.
8. Place on the prepared cookie sheets and refrigerate until the chocolate is set.
9. Makes about 60 cookies.
